phase.name: checkout-discovery
phase.description: Discovery and requirements for checkout scope

phase.name: checkout-security
phase.description: Security and compliance for payment checkout

milestones.title: Checkout Foundation
milestones.description: Discovery, UX design, security model, and API contracts — phases 0 through 3

milestones.title: Checkout Build
milestones.description: Backend payment orchestration and frontend checkout implementation — phases 4 and 5

milestones.title: Checkout Validation & Launch
milestones.description: Testing, payment simulation, observability, and release readiness — phases 6 and 7

templates.title: [Phase 0] Discovery & Requirements — Checkout Scope
templates.label: checkout-discovery
templates.description: Discover checkout requirements, constraints, and success criteria

templates.title: [Phase 1] Checkout UX & Flow Design — Journey Definition
templates.label: checkout-ux
templates.description: Design checkout journeys, validation, and recovery UX

templates.title: [Phase 2] Security & Compliance — Payment Protection
templates.label: checkout-security
templates.description: Define PCI, tokenization, webhook verification, and fraud controls

templates.title: [Phase 3] Gateway & API Contracts — Integration Boundaries
templates.label: checkout-gateway
templates.description: Define payment APIs, provider abstraction, and retry semantics

templates.title: [Phase 4] Backend Payment Orchestration — State Management
templates.label: checkout-backend
templates.description: Implement payment orchestration, reconciliation, and compensation hooks

templates.title: [Phase 5] Frontend Checkout Implementation — Customer Experience
templates.label: checkout-frontend
templates.description: Implement checkout UI, tokenization boundary, and resilient submission

templates.title: [Phase 6] Testing & Payment Simulation — Validation Matrix
templates.label: checkout-testing
templates.description: Validate payment flows with unit, integration, and E2E simulations

templates.title: [Phase 7] Observability & Release Readiness — Launch Governance
templates.label: checkout-observability
templates.description: Define checkout KPIs, alerts, runbooks, and launch criteria
